verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Your mercy Your majesty Surrounds me You whisper So tenderly That You are with me What a perfect love What a perfect love

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, pull me closer Don't let me go Keep me where You are Keep me where You are

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Your presence So wonderful Overwhelming Your glory So beautiful All consuming What a perfect love What a perfect love

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh, pull me closer Don't let me go Keep me where You are Keep me where You are Fade the world around me Till Your face, is all I see Keep me where You are Keep me where You are

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh, pull me closer And don't let me go Keep me where You are (Keep me where You are) Keep me where You are Fade the world around me Till Your face, is all I see (Till Your face) Keep me where You are (Keep me where You are) Keep me where You are
